label: FACIS Simulation — Tick Loop
info:
FACIS Simulation — Tick Loop

Self-adjusting wall-clock timer that fires a tick whenever
  real_interval_ms = (interval_minutes * 60_000) / acceleration
elapses. Honours the FSM in the Engine tab — if engine.state !== 'running'
the timer keeps spinning but emits no tick message.

Each tick advances flow.engine.simulation_time by interval_minutes * 60s
and emits a `sim.tick.trigger` message via link-out so the Feeds tab can
drive the simulators (Phase 8).

name: tick scheduler
